description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a modern yet traditional suburban design, surrounded by a fenced yard. The front features a prominent covered entryway with columns, a paved driveway leading to a double garage, and a semi-circular porch. The backyard includes a swimming pool, trampoline, patio seating, and a small playhouse, all set within landscaped grounds with trees and shrubs. The house has a flat and partially gabled roof, with multiple large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, complemented by white window frames and light-colored paving. The property is enclosed by a low, light-colored fence, providing both privacy and a clear boundary.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a double garage, covered entryway, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, trampoline, and playhouse. The design blends modern and traditional elements with symmetrical windows and a fenced perimeter.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the backyard amenities including the pool, trampoline, and patio, as well as the overall layout of the property.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, showcasing the main entryway with columns, the double garage, and the paved driveway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side and rear of the house, emphasizing the brick exterior, backyard play area, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyard, revealing the pool, trampoline, patio seating, and the fenced boundary with landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, semi-circular porch, steps, and a double front door
